name: houssem-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Houssem Djeghri.

plugins.name: bridger
plugins.description: Let two Claude Code sessions message each other: named peers, file-based threads, ask/answer with full live context.

plugins.name: carry-on
plugins.description: Auto-resume Claude Code sessions after a usage-limit reset: hook-native, no daemon, no keystrokes.
